title: rubus pinetorum
intro: Rubus pinetorum, also known as the Pine Bramble or Mountain Raspberry, is a type of raspberry-like flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China and the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Rubus pinetorum include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus pinetorum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical remedies.
